# markdown

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Unified markdown renderer. Extensions contribute syntax highlighting, file links, active data, and image proxy via Markdown.Extension slot.
- Defines:
  - Slots: `Markdown.Extension`
- Exports (web):
  - Types: `CodeHandler`, `MarkdownExtension`
  - Values: `Markdown`, `MarkdownContent`
- Slot contributors: `active-data`, `code-explorer`, `file-links`, `syntax-highlight`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
